description_long: This is a stylized adult figure dressed in traditional East Asian attire, featuring a long, flowing robe with wide sleeves and a high-waisted skirt. The garment is adorned with subtle floral patterns and layered fabric details, giving it an elegant and ceremonial appearance. The figure's arms are extended slightly outward, and the hands are visible at the ends of the sleeves. The face is smooth and stylized, with defined eyes and lips, and the head is topped with a simple, close-fitting cap or hair arrangement. The overall silhouette is tall and slender, with the robe extending to the ground and the sleeves draping gracefully. The figure stands upright, exuding a calm and composed demeanor.
description: A stylized adult in traditional East Asian ceremonial attire with a long robe, wide sleeves, and floral patterns, standing upright with arms slightly extended.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and the detailed front of the robe with floral patterns and layered sleeves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the arm's length, and the draping of the sleeve along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the full length of the robe, and the symmetrical drape of the wide sleeves.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the sleeve's drape, with the hand visible at the end.
attribute_clothing_type: traditional ceremonial robe with wide sleeves and a long skirt
